name: The Confessor
passiveDescription: All damage-over-time effects applied by friendly units last 1 additional turn and deal increased damage.

traits.name: Judgment
traits.description: Once per mission, applies a damage-over-time effect to all visible enemy units simultaneously.

name: The Shepherd
passiveDescription: All friendly units recover a small amount of health at the start of each turn.

traits.name: Refuge
traits.description: Adjacent friendly units receive a defense bonus equal to the Shepherd's current defense stat.

name: The Director
passiveDescription: All friendly units deal increased damage. The bonus is higher for units that have not moved this turn.

traits.name: Coordinated Strike
traits.description: Once per turn, a friendly unit within 4 tiles may make a bonus attack immediately after the Director attacks.

name: The Analyst
passiveDescription: All friendly units have extended vision range. Enemy units within the Analyst's vision are marked, reducing their defense.

traits.name: Full Assessment
traits.description: Once per mission, reveals all enemy positions on the map for 2 turns regardless of fog of war.

name: The Warlord
passiveDescription: All friendly units deal significantly increased damage. The bonus scales with the number of enemies remaining — the fewer enemies, the higher the bonus.

traits.name: Challenge
traits.description: Once per mission, forces a target enemy unit to attack the Warlord on their next turn if possible.

name: The Undying
passiveDescription: All friendly units have increased movement range. Units that move before attacking deal bonus damage.

traits.name: Press Forward
traits.description: Friendly units that end their turn adjacent to an enemy gain a bonus attack action next turn.

name: The Captain
passiveDescription: All friendly units deal increased damage and receive a minor health regeneration each turn. The bonus increases when the Captain is in close proximity to the action.

traits.name: That's An Order
traits.description: Once per turn, grants a friendly unit within 3 tiles an immediate bonus action.

name: The Fixer
passiveDescription: Wrecker and Scavenger abilities have reduced cooldowns and increased effect magnitude. All friendly units have a chance to apply a random debuff on attack.

traits.name: Contingency
traits.description: Once per mission, when a friendly unit would be destroyed, the Fixer can spend 2 actions to leave it at 1 health instead.
